## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Testing

<!-- List commands and manual checks, or explain why testing was not needed. -->

- [ ] I ran `npm run build` for app changes, or this PR only changes docs/community files.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I included screenshots for visible UI changes.
- [ ] I manually tested relevant install, pairing, tray, or streaming-site behavior.

## Protocol/profile checklist

- [ ] I updated both `server/src/types.rs` and `client/src/types.ts` for wire-format changes, or this PR does not change protocol types.
- [ ] I updated profile bindings, binding tests, and README controls for profile changes, or this PR does not change profiles.
- [ ] I verified profile shortcuts in a focused browser player, or this PR does not change profiles.

## Security notes

- [ ] I reviewed whether this changes token auth, LAN exposure, static serving, installer behavior, startup behavior, or OS-level input automation.
- [ ] I called out any security-sensitive behavior changes in the PR description.
